keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: List of job titles to search for on LinkedIn. Each keyword runs a separate search.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location to search for jobs (e.g. United States, New York, San Francisco)

datePosted.title: Date Posted
datePosted.description: Only return jobs posted within this time window

maxJobs.title: Max Jobs Per Keyword
maxJobs.description: Maximum number of job listings to scrape per keyword search (e.g. 5 keywords * 10 jobs = 50 total before deduplication)
